Title: The Tyranny of the Two-Wheeled Elite

It has come to my attention that our council, in its infinite wisdom, has bestowed upon the
cycling classes a ribbon of fresh green paint stretching the length of downtown. Pedestrians,
once the honest backbone of this city, are now shooed to the margins while lycra-clad crusaders
ring their smug little bells and glide past on their gleaming machines. One shudders to imagine
where such indulgence ends: valet racks for scooters, perhaps, or a heated pavilion for the
unicyclists.

Subject context:
ARTICLE 1: Downtown gains a connected grid of protected bike lanes. The council approved a
network of protected lanes across the downtown core, linking existing routes for cyclists.
